requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire Safety and Installation Requirements

summary.en: Sri Lanka does not yet have a dedicated national BESS fire-safety standard equivalent to IEC 62933-5-2 or NFPA 855. However, BESS installations in Sri Lanka are subject to general fire safety and building regulations administered by the local fire authority (Sri Lanka Fire Brigade or municipal fire offices). Project owners, insurers, and CEB may require fire-safety evidence including thermal-runaway mitigation measures, gas detection or ventilation design, emergency shutdown procedures, and installation segregation documentation. PUCSL-regulated projects may be subject to additional safety review.
summary.zh: 斯里兰卡尚无等同于IEC 62933-5-2或NFPA 855的专用国家BESS消防安全标准。但斯里兰卡的BESS安装受斯里兰卡消防局或市政消防部门管理的通用消防安全和建筑法规约束。项目业主、保险方和CEB可能要求提供消防安全证据，包括热失控缓解措施、气体探测或通风设计、应急停机程序和安装隔离文件。PUCSL监管项目可能须接受额外安全审查。
summary.zht: 斯里蘭卡尚無等同於IEC 62933-5-2或NFPA 855的專用國家BESS消防安全標準。但斯里蘭卡的BESS安裝受斯里蘭卡消防局或市政消防部門管理的通用消防安全和建築法規約束。項目業主、保險方和CEB可能要求提供消防安全證據，包括熱失控緩解措施、氣體探測或通風設計、應急停機程序和安裝隔離文件。PUCSL監管項目可能須接受額外安全審查。

standards_or_laws: Sri Lanka Fire Services Act and local fire authority requirements
IEC 62619: Thermal abuse and safety tests at cell/module level
IEC 62933-5-2: Safety requirements for grid-integrated energy storage systems (reference standard for project owners)
Local building and fire regulations applicable to BESS installation sites

summary.en: China uses GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 for cell and system safety, GB/T 36558-2023 for grid-connected BESS requirements, and project-specific fire-safety review processes administered by local fire authorities. These Chinese fire-safety review processes do not transfer to Sri Lanka fire authority requirements.
summary.zh: 中国采用GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023作为电芯和系统安全标准，GB/T 36558-2023作为并网BESS要求，并采用地方消防主管机关管理的项目特定消防审查流程。这些中国消防安全审查流程不适用于斯里兰卡消防主管机关要求。
summary.zht: 中國採用GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023作為電芯和系統安全標準，GB/T 36558-2023作為併網BESS要求，並採用地方消防主管機關管理的項目特定消防審查流程。這些中國消防安全審查流程不適用於斯里蘭卡消防主管機關要求。

gap.en: Chinese product-level safety certificates do not close the Sri Lanka fire-safety gap for BESS installations. Exporters should prepare thermal-runaway propagation test evidence, gas detection or ventilation design documentation, emergency shutdown logic description, installation segregation drawings, and English-language emergency response procedures for review by the Sri Lanka local fire authority, project owner, and insurer before commissioning.
gap.zh: 中国产品级安全证书无法覆盖斯里兰卡BESS安装的消防安全差距。出口商应准备热失控扩散测试证据、气体探测或通风设计文件、应急停机逻辑说明、安装隔离图和英文应急程序，以供斯里兰卡地方消防主管机关、项目业主和保险方在调试前审查。
gap.zht: 中國產品級安全證書無法覆蓋斯里蘭卡BESS安裝的消防安全差距。出口商應準備熱失控擴散測試證據、氣體探測或通風設計文件、應急停機邏輯說明、安裝隔離圖和英文應急程序，以供斯里蘭卡地方消防主管機關、項目業主和保險方在調試前審查。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for installation approval where local fire authority review applies; project owner and insurer requirements may add further fire-safety expectations
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval and local fire review requirements

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB battery safety certification alone is not sufficient for Sri Lanka BESS project installation approval. Prepare a fire-safety documentation package including thermal-runaway evidence, gas detection design, emergency procedures, and installation drawings for local fire authority, project owner, and insurer review.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅凭中国GB电池安全认证不足以完成斯里兰卡BESS项目安装批准。需准备消防安全文件包，包括热失控证据、气体探测设计、应急程序和安装图，供地方消防主管机关、项目业主和保险方审查。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅憑中國GB電池安全認證不足以完成斯里蘭卡BESS項目安裝批准。需準備消防安全文件包，包括熱失控證據、氣體探測設計、應急程序和安裝圖，供地方消防主管機關、項目業主和保險方審查。
